required_facts.description: Tasks are defined as typed artifacts that point to evidence specs.
The corpus validation requires multiple traversal entry points for the initial tasks.

acceptable_proofs.value: must offer multiple traversal entry points

supporting_facts.description: Prepare-to-edit is the preferred early task class.

acceptable_proofs.value: This should be the most important early class

distractor_facts.description: The context-window schema is related but does not define task authoring rules.
